name: Swzzle Red Liniment
shortDescription: Your 7am tee time doesn't care that your shoulders feel like rusty gate hinges. Swzzle Red is the pre-round heat engine — capsaicin-driven warmth that gets blood moving to cold, stiff muscles before you even reach the tee pad.
longDescription: Built for the athlete who refuses to spend the first three holes as a warm-up. Swzzle Red delivers capsaicin-driven heat deep into muscle tissue, using castor oil as the carrier and black pepper extract to amplify the turmeric concentrate already working underneath. Apply 15-20 minutes before you throw. By the time you're on hole one, your shoulders, forearms, and hip flexors are already operating at game-speed temperature. This isn't a topical that smells like your grandpa's medicine cabinet — it's an engineered pre-round protocol in a bottle.
ingredients: Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil, Menthol, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Extract, Tocopherol, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Camphor, Zingiber Officinale (Ginger) Root Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil, Piper Nigrum (Black Pepper) Seed Oil, Cinnamomum Zeylanicum (Cinnamon) Bark Oil, Capsicum Frutescens (Capsaicin) Fruit Extract
directions: Apply 4-6 drops to palm. Massage into muscles before activity. Focus on shoulders, forearms, lower back, and hip flexors. Wash hands thoroughly after applying. Keep away from eyes and face. Apply 15-20 minutes before activity.
warnings: For external use only. Patch test before first use. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. Do not use with heating pad.

name: Swzzle Blue Liniment
shortDescription: You just threw 18 holes in 90-degree heat. Your arm feels like it owes you an apology. Swzzle Blue is the post-round cool-down — menthol and eucalyptus up front, castor oil working overnight while you pretend tomorrow won't hurt.
longDescription: The round is over but your body hasn't gotten the memo yet. Swzzle Blue leads with menthol and eucalyptus for immediate cooling sensation, then lets castor oil and turmeric concentrate do the real work while you sleep. The peppermint and camphor combination creates a heat-cool cycle that keeps working long after application. Rub it into your shoulders, forearms, and whatever else you punished today. Your body did the work — Swzzle Blue is how you say thanks.
ingredients: Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil, Menthol, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Extract, Tocopherol, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Camphor, Zingiber Officinale (Ginger) Root Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil, Piper Nigrum (Black Pepper) Seed Oil
directions: Apply 4-6 drops to palm. Massage into muscles after activity. Focus on shoulders, forearms, lower back, and hip flexors. Wash hands thoroughly after applying. Keep away from eyes and face.
warnings: For external use only. Patch test before first use. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. Do not use with heating pad.

name: Swzzle Bundle
shortDescription: The full pre-round and post-round system. Heat up before you play, cool down after you're done. Two bottles, zero excuses, five bucks saved. This is the complete athlete stack.
longDescription: Why pick a side when you can run the full protocol? The Swzzle Bundle pairs Red and Blue into a complete warm-up/cool-down system designed for athletes who take their body as seriously as their game. Red before you play — capsaicin heat, blood flow, game-ready muscles. Blue after — menthol cooling, overnight recovery, ready for tomorrow. Save $5 versus buying them separately, which means you're already smarter than you were thirty seconds ago.
directions: Use Red before activity. Use Blue after. Repeat until you forget how old you are.
